name: VulnHub-DC-1
isolation_note: VulnHub boxes are full VMs. Run on an isolated host-only / internal virtual network (VirtualBox host-only or an air-gapped vSwitch), take a snapshot before the run, and keep a kill switch. Confirm the target IP is private before authorizing.
rationale: Drupalgeddon2 RCE -> SUID find privesc. A web-entry VulnHub box that matches the abstraction well, but it is a full VM with a non-web privesc step (SUID) and an out-of-abstraction offline-crack branch. Use only AFTER the DVWA closed loop works end-to-end (Phase 3).
